name: honerix
description: Honerix is a distributed system for capturing web-based attacks. Honerix works by simulating vulnerable applications, with the goal of pushing attackers into deploying their malicious payload. Tool: https://www.honerix.com. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #335 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map honerix output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved honerix output file to parse instead of running it live.
